content:
Now updated with new realms info and a written version.
With the contribution of <@693905974750216212>
This is a comprehensive list of terms and mechanics to help you better understand the game.
You can read a good amount of game mechanics and terminologies in the light bulb icon on the left of your lobby screen too.

For an easier read, you can **look at the** **[__Power Point__](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1pnheXD_pkjz8YGmWWlQPnw4eXr6NRm-W6267c0K1_QU/edit?slide=id.p1#slide=id.p1)** version too. 

This Guide is separated in various parts:
- **[Game Terminologies](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118/1511362859156766760)**
- **[Realm Mechanics](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118/1511363001167380591)**
- **[Stat Breakdown](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118/1511363184764780744)**
- **[Divine Realm: Aequor](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118/1511363431683461240)**
- **[Singularity: Ultra](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118/1511363592253870150)**
- **[Propagation: Caro](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1511362816362283118/1511363690862084118)**

**REALM MECHANICS**:
> **Realms** are the factions each character falls under, there’s 4 of them and they're linked lore-wise & mechanic wise.  
> **You can mix 2 realms** in a team, weakening their unique mechanics but getting both, while
> **“Pure”** teams are composed of either solely units from one realm or mixed with Chaos.

**Aequor:**  
> **1)** You start the fight with **1 Permanent Tentacle, 2 if Pure**.
> All tentacles will attack the front-most enemy at the end of the turn.
> All STR buffs affect Tentacle Damage in a 1\2 ratio (2 STR is 1 Tentacle Damage).
> **Tentacle CRate and CDMG formula:**
> * The sum of all 4 characters’ CRate at the start of the battle ÷2;
> * The extra CRate gained during battle is the team sum ÷ 4 aka team average (Crit damage uses the same formula).
> **2)** The tentacle Base Damage is derived from is 20% of team Average ATK, with a keeper level multiplayer of up to x1.9 at lv70.
> **3)** Each Exalt increases **Tentacle Assembly** (how many times tentacles attack that turn) by 1 (even by units from other realms).
> **4)** You can swap between **3 different stances** by tapping the tentacle icon (with the damage numbers under it), you can’t change again that turn:
> * **The Blue Stance (Surging Tides)** is the base one, the tentacles do 100% of their damage and at the start of the next turn you’ll get an extra Permanent Tentacle;
> * **White Stance (Tranquil Sea)** immediately gives a shield equal to 8% of Max HP and 0.2% more every time a tentacle attack, but the tentacles deal only 50% of their damage;
> * **The Red Stance (Raging Waves)** makes tentacles deal 125% of their damage, and every time you deal direct damage to an enemy (one hit that is not poison, bleed, counter damage etc), a tentacle will attack for 50% of its damage, but you will lose 1 Permanent Tentacle at the start of the next turn.

**Caro:**
> **1)** **Embryo Fusion** + 30 at the start of the turn, this is amplified to a maximum of 100% depending on missing HP.
> When the Embryo Fusion bar goes up to 100, you will get a 0 Cost Embryo card in hand with Retain, that can be used on a unit to give it 30 Aliemus and party-wide 10% Crit Rate, or it can be Devoured when a Caro unit uses their exalt to activate a special effect listed in brackets.
> **2)** **Crimson Furnace** (red globe at the start of the Embryo Fusion bar, tapped for healing) increases by 3% Max HP at the start of the turn, doubled if Pure Caro, and another 5% after the battle. For every Embryo card in your hand at the end of the battle, you gain an additional 5%;
> The Furnace limit is equal to 25% of Max HP.
> **3)** The Caro Awakeners have a special **Devour** effect on their Exalt that will activate if you have an Embryo in Hand, Consuming it.
> **4)** The first **Devour** each turn will give shield (4% Max HP) and temporary Strength (2% Max HP), that increase up to 100% depending on missing hp.

**Ultra:**
> **1)** The first card played each turn will be copied (with no Orisons or the like) in the **Ultra Space**.
> After filling all the slots in the Ultra Space, you enter the **Ultra Round**, an extra turn that places all the cards in the Ultra Space in your hand. If not Pure, all damage, shield, Aliemus, Strength, Counter etc, generated during it is reduced by 25% (it is counted as if you have passed the turn and the enemy hasn't, so temporary effects and debuffs count down when passing to the Ultra Round, shields are retained from the previous turn, as are the cards with Retain in your hand. The debuffs on the enemy will not count down).
> **2) **The first card played each turn will triggers the **Leap Effect** listed on selected cards of Ultra units, all Leap effects will trigger when playing this cards in the Ultra Turn.
> Some character have **Quasar**, that will be trigger for the first card played every turn and will never trigger in the Ultra Turn, but the Quasar card copied in it will have -1 cost.
> **3)** **Annihilation: **Tap the Purple Orb on the left of Ultra Space to Remove the leftmost card in Ultra Space and add 1 Insight (0 cost card that gives 1 Arith and draws 1 card) to your hand, usable once per turn.

**DIVINE: AEQUOR**
> Tentacle DMG is changed to 5% of the team's max HP.
> Team DMG Amplification +50% after the exploration begins (Doubled if the team is entirely Aequor or with Chaos, though no additional tentacles will be obtained).
> Automatic Tentacle gathering effect is removed (Covenant Returnal Line 6-piece effect still works).
> 
> **Divine Realms: Tentacle Stance Features new effects:**
> Tranquil Sea: Immediately generates Shield equal to 25% max HP, and tentacles no longer attack at turn end (3 Turns cooldown);
> Raging Waves: Tentacle Damage x125% for the turn; after dealing Active DMG, 1 tentacle attacks, loose 1 Tentacle at turn end. (3 Turns cooldown).
> 
> **Aequor Realm Mastery: **
> Each point provides:
> Tranquil Sea stance's Shield Generation +0.025% Max HP;
> Raging Waves stance's Tentacle DMG +0.025%.
> Effect doubled if the team is entirely Aequor or with Chaos Awakeners

**SINGULARITY: ULTRA**
> Upon starting the exploration, the team gain +50% DMG AMP (+100% if the team is only Ultra or with Chaos), and 15 stacks of Singularity Prism that are effective on all cards.
> 
> **Singularity Prism:** All cards will gain the effects of Singularity Beacon equal to this effects stacks (so is like all cards have the boosts of 15 stacks of Singularity Beacon).
> **Singularity Beacon: **For every stack, Final Damage, STR/Tentacle Damage generation, and Fixed Poison and Counter will be amplified by 2%. Also increases Final Heals, Shields, and STR Down effects by 1%. Cards with this buff cannot be copied into the Ultra Space. Removed after the card is played
> 
> **Dimensional Shuttle:** The first card that is played in a turn will benefit for 25 stacks of Singularity Beacon (this effect is not shown in the card numbers preview), and a base fleeting copy of the card will be added in the Ultra Space with the same stacks.
> 
> **Singularity Annihilation: **With a 3 turn cooldown, you can move the Leftmost card from the Ultra Space to your hand.
> 
> **Ultra Realm Mastery:** For each 1 point of RM, you gain 0.05% more stacks of Singularity Beacon and Singularity Prism, double if Pure ultra or with Chaos.

**PROPAGATION: CARO**
> At the start of exploration, Max HP +10%, team DMG Amplification +50%, and all Awakeners gain 20 temporary stacks of Propagation Fiesta at the start of each turn. 
> If the team consists only of Caro or Chaos Awakeners, the DMG Amplification granted by this effect is doubled.
> 
> **Propagation Fiesta: **Each stack enhances the following effects of that Awakener's next Exalt this turn by 1%: Final DMG, STR/Tentacle DMG Bonus, Fixed Poison, Fixed Counter, Fixed Shield, Fixed HP Recovery, and STR⯆.
> 
> **Embryo Fusion: **The Embryo Fusion gained per turn increases to 50~100, scaling with HP lost. 
> The Embryo Fusion cap increases from 100 to 200. 
> Upon reaching the cap, add 1 Propagule Embryo into hand.
> 
> **Propagule Embryo: **Playing this card no longer grants Crit. Rate. Devour no longer grants Shield or Temporary STR. The first time each Awakener consumes (Devour or Use for Aliemus) a Propagule Embryo each turn, they gain 40 temporary stacks of Propagation Fiesta.
> 
> **Crimson Furnace:** The auto-accumulation at the start of each turn changes to 10% of HP lost, up to 50% of Max HP. No longer accumulates at the end of battle. 
> 3 turns cooldown to use.
> 
> **Crimson Corrosion: **After using Crimson Furnace, inflict Corrosion on all enemies equal to 1% of their Max HP. The more Crimson Furnace consumed, the stronger the Corrosion effect, up to +100%. Deals 5× Corrosion effect against "Empty Shell" enemies.
> 
> **Realm Mastery Effect:** Each point of Realm Mastery increases the temporary 20 Propagation Fiesta stacks at the start of the turn, and the 40 from consuming the Embryos, by 0.05%.
> If the team consists only of Caro or Chaos Awakeners, the Propagation: Caro Mastery effect is doubled.
New list and first brainrot content. TIERLIST. Hope you enjoy
